positive: A vibrant, highly stylized geometric celestial landscape featuring interlocking rings, abstract planetary orbits, and nebula clusters rendered in deep sapphire blue, electric teal, neon magenta, and glowing gold. The central focus is a majestic, stylized crescent moon and a ringed gas giant, designed with clean, bold silhouettes against a cosmic backdrop. Emphasize high contrast, intricate line work, and perfect symmetry, reminiscent of mid-century modern space posters meets bioluminescence. The composition must be centered and scalable for apparel print. Cinematic lighting, volumetric fog, vector illustration style, high detail, perfect symmetry, 8k, artwork for merchandise.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, signature, logo, copyright, messy, grainy, poor composition
